overall.description: First-person gameplay footage inside the Afterlife bar from Cyberpunk 2077. The player approaches a bartender in a neon-drenched cyberpunk nightclub with vibrant purple and cyan lighting, then surveys the main floor area filled with patrons and futuristic decor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub entrance and bar counter

events.description: enters the main club area from the entrance corridor, revealing the neon-lit interior
approaches the bar counter and stops in front of the bartender

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance toward the bar while observing the neon-drenched surroundings

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter, gesturing with hands while facing the player

entered.detail: glowing red neon sign reading 'AFTERLIFE' on the left wall near the entrance
metallic escalator or stairway structure with blue neon lighting on the left side
long dark bar counter with reflective surface and bottles arranged behind it
transparent glass safety railing with metal frames separating the walkway from lower levels
geometric grid of neon light panels emitting purple and cyan light overhead
elevated DJ platform with equipment and vertical neon light strips in the background

segments.scene_description: The player enters the Afterlife nightclub, walking past the glowing red neon sign toward the bar counter. A bartender stands ready behind the bar as geometric neon grids illuminate the industrial ceiling. The space features glass railings and metallic structures typical of cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub main floor with seating and social areas

events.description: camera pans right to survey the main club floor, turning away from the bar
patrons walking through the background become more visible as the camera continues panning

agents.ego_description: standing at the bar and slowly panning the view to observe the club's interior, seating areas, and other patrons

entered.detail: circular tables with drinks and items on them, surrounded by seating in the foreground
modern curved sofa seating arrangements with patrons sitting and socializing
large circular architectural element with concentric rings suspended from the ceiling
tall vertical neon light columns emitting bright cyan and purple light

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the main floor of the nightclub, revealing round tables with drinks, curved seating areas, and scattered patrons walking or socializing. The industrial ceiling features a prominent circular structure with neon accents, while vertical light beams illuminate the far wall. The glass railing now appears on the left as the view shifts away from the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the entrance of a neon-drenched nightclub into the heart of its bustling main floor. It begins by passing a glowing red neon sign and advancing toward a bar counter where a bartender stands beneath an industrial ceiling of geometric neon grids. As the camera reaches the bar, the perspective shifts away from the entrance, gliding past metallic structures and glass railings. The scene then expands to reveal the wider club interior, panning across curved seating areas and round tables occupied by socializing patrons. Finally, the view opens up to showcase the full scale of the venue, highlighting a prominent circular ceiling structure and vertical beams of light illuminating the far wall.
